title: Shadow's PVP pack
description: This Modpack contains all the necessary mods for PVP optimization and mechanics
body:
🔥 Ultimate PvP & FPS Boost Modpack 🔥

Take your Minecraft combat to the next level with this high-performance PvP-focused modpack. Designed for smooth gameplay and competitive advantage, this pack combines powerful optimization mods with essential PvP enhancements.

⚔️ PvP Ready
Enjoy better hit registration, smoother animations, and an overall improved combat experience built for intense battles.

🚀 Massive FPS Boost
Carefully selected performance mods ensure higher FPS, reduced lag, and faster loading times—even on low-end PCs.

🎯 Optimized for Competitive Play
Clean visuals, reduced clutter, and enhanced responsiveness help you focus on what matters: winning fights.

💻 Works on Low-End & High-End PCs
Whether you're on a budget setup or a powerful machine, this modpack delivers stable and smooth gameplay.
